title: oberna caliacrae
intro: Oberna caliacrae, also known as the 'purple toadflax', is a species of flowering plant in the bignonia family. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties due to its bioactive compounds, and it has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oberna caliacrae include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Oberna caliacrae include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used externally to promote wound healing and internally to support digestive health.
